subcodes.first_line: The Self-Subsisting One hath appeared after the Qá'im, and hath arisen to uphold the Cause with such sovereignty that none in the heavens or on earth can stand before Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر القیوم بعد القائم و قام علی الامر بسلطان لا یقوم معه من فی السموات و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @twin Manifestations, @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action
